title: Easily navigate to connected boards from Monday CRM

posts.author: Alberto-SO (Alberto Delgado)
posts.cookedHtml:
Here’s the scenario:

  1. I connect an item in board A to a related item in board B using a Connect Boards column.
  2. When looking at the item in board A, I realize I have to navigate to the connected item in Board B.
  3. But when I click on the connected item, I don’t have an option to go to it. I get some details about it, but no way to actually go there.

In this case, I would like to go to the item “NPD review and approval”, which is in a different board. In Monday Work Management, actually.

However, when I click on the item, this interface opens, which offers no way to navigate to the connected board, nor any useful information, in this case:

image1370×623 51.9 KB

A similar issue happens when navigating from Work Management to Monday CRM. The usual navigation link is not available in the connected item’s details view.

image691×702 36 KB
